name: A Large-Scale Dataset of MCP Implementations on GitHub

description: arXiv:2607.10123v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The rapid emergence of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) has introduced a new standard for connecting large language models to external tools and services. Despite its rapid adoption in open-source development, systematic understanding of how MCP is implemented, structured, and maintained remains limited. This study presents the first large-scale...
author: Benny Toeppe, Amine Barrak, Emna Ksontini
